{{CargoRelic
|name=St. Patrick's Shamrock
|class_id=22458
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=08-21
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Aug 21, 432 AD, Saint Patrick picked this shamrock to explain the doctrine to the Irish people.<br>Saint Patrick came to Ireland to convert the locals to Catholicism under the Pope's instruction. However, he faced hostility from many residents who planned to harm him. In a crisis, Saint Patrick used a shamrock to explain the doctrine of the Trinity, successfully converting them. This clover became one of his symbols and was cherished by many.
|fame=24
|art=32
|fth=48
|civ=21
|tech=29
|ss1=Angel Minion DEF +1%
|ss2=Angel Minion DEF +2%
|ss3=Angel Minion DEF +3%
|ss4=Angel Minion DEF +5%
|ss7=Angel Minion DEF +5%<br>Angel Minion DEF +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Prairiesanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: Prairie Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
